about.title: About Us
about.heroSubtitle: We create collections where every girl feels truly special
about.storyP1: Kiddie Chic is a Kyiv-based children's clothing brand for girls. We believe every little girl deserves clothing that highlights her individuality and brings joy every day.
about.storyP2: Every piece in our collection is carefully selected: soft fabrics that won't irritate skin, thoughtful details, and colors that won't fade after washing. We combine style with comfort — because an active child shouldn't sacrifice one for the other.
about.storyP3: We continuously update our range, following the latest children's fashion trends in Europe, and offer pieces that stay relevant season after season.
about.value1Text: Only trusted materials — cotton, linen, knitwear — safe and gentle on children's skin.
about.value2Text: Modern cuts and color solutions inspired by the best children's brands in Europe.
about.value3Text: We are always in touch and will help you find the perfect look for your daughter.
about.showroomText: Visit our showroom in Kyiv, where you can see and try on all collections in person.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.mapTitle: Kiddie Chic showroom on the map

terms.title: Order terms
terms.onlineSiteDesc: You can place an order online via the «Cart» on our website at any convenient time (24/7).
terms.processingDesc: Orders are processed daily from 11:00 to 19:00. If you placed an order outside of working hours, we will contact you at the start of the next working day.
terms.confirmationDesc: After placing your order, you will receive an automatic email, and our manager may contact you via messenger or phone to confirm the details.
terms.payOnlineDesc: Fast and secure card payment (Visa/Mastercard) directly during checkout via the ПУМБ / Hutko payment system.
terms.payCodDesc: Pay in cash or by card when collecting your parcel at a Nova Poshta branch.
terms.payCodNote: When choosing cash on delivery, Nova Poshta charges an additional transfer fee (usually 20 UAH + 2% of the order amount). This fee is paid by the buyer.
terms.deliveryItem1: All orders are shipped exclusively by Nova Poshta across Ukraine.
terms.deliveryItem2: You can choose delivery to a branch, parcel locker, or select courier delivery.
terms.deliveryItem3: Delivery costs are calculated according to the carrier's rates and are paid by the buyer upon receipt.
terms.deliveryItem4: Orders are dispatched within 1–2 business days after confirmation. After dispatch, you will receive a tracking number.
terms.receivingItem1: Please inspect your order at the Nova Poshta branch or with the courier before accepting it.
terms.receivingItem2: Check the packaging, size and model. If you notice damage or a discrepancy — refuse the parcel and contact us.
terms.receivingItem3: Parcels are stored free of charge at a Nova Poshta branch for 5 calendar days. On day 6, the parcel is automatically returned to the sender.

footer.tagline: Premium dresses for little princesses. Handmade, finest fabrics, delivery across Ukraine.

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve the experience on our site.
